title: Python Development
description: A curated database of premium learning resources to master Python programming, scripting, data engineering, and web development.

categories.name: Python Language Basics
categories.description: Master core syntax, data types, functions, and procedural logic.

resources.name: Python for Everybody (PY4E)
resources.description: An excellent first step into coding. Teaches core computing concepts using Python, complete with lecture videos, exercises, and autograded coding challenges.

resources.name: Python Official Tutorial
resources.description: The official handbook introducing the language's core syntax, standard libraries, modules, and built-in datatypes systematically.

resources.name: Automate the Boring Stuff with Python
resources.description: A highly practical book focused on applying Python to automate daily spreadsheet, document, file-handling, and scraping tasks.

categories.name: OOP & Advanced Concepts
categories.description: Dive deep into Python's object-oriented paradigms, decorators, memory handling, and concurrency.

resources.name: Real Python Tutorials
resources.description: Extremely thorough, peer-reviewed articles and video courses explaining complex intermediate mechanics like decorators, generators, pytest, and multithreading.

resources.name: Corey Schafer's Python Playlist
resources.description: Widely regarded as the best free modular video course. Highly recommended for its deep-dive series on Object-Oriented Python, virtual environments, and SQL databases.

categories.name: Python Web Ecosystem
categories.description: Build high-performance REST APIs, real-time microservices, and server-rendered SaaS portals.

resources.name: FastAPI Official Documentation
resources.description: The gold standard of framework docs, featuring clean code snippets, automatic interactive documentation guides, and deep type-safe practices.

resources.name: Django 'Polls' Tutorial & Documentation
resources.description: A comprehensive introductory tutorial that guides developers through building a production-grade database-driven poll app using Django's MVC/MTV structure.
